en.text: O most noble of the Bharat dynasty
and of the ultimate ecstasy of divine love
as transcendental to the modes of material nature
from the miseries of birth, death, and old age
as a human attached to action
with a predominance of the mode of passion
with a predominance of the mode of passion
the modes of passion and ignorance
Those in the mode of passion
is equipoised in happiness and unhappiness
with the vision of equality towards earth, stone, or gold
of the wombs of all species
and is a renouncer of all mundane endeavours
Persons situated in the mode of goodness
known as goodness, passion, and ignorance
and of the nature of goodness
when the mode of ignorance predominates
by the force of the mode of ignorance
balanced with regard to abuse and praise
equipoised in desirable and undesirable circumstances
Persons in the mode of ignorance
of persons of higher knowledge (worshippers of Hiraṇyagarbha [Brahmā], etc.)

ru.text: семя, т. е. души (дживы, атмы), «семена сознания», нисходящие из Брахмана, благодаря тому, что Господь бросает взгляд на мир материи
беременность, т. е. махат-таттва, единство праматерии и душ
миров великих мудрецов, таких как Брахмалока или Джаналока
